spec_match.rationale: The overlay layer now applies native alpha(from var(--overlay-color) / var(--overlay-alpha)) when supported, with a generated rgba() fallback token.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive with live color picker and opacity slider updating the preview and generated CSS.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb aligns well with the convenience of alpha() for overlays.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now detects the real alpha() grammar with CSS.supports() and shows a clear fallback state if unsupported.

references.rationale: Includes link to ChromeStatus and CSS Color 5 spec.

design_system.rationale: Consistent with the design system styles and layout.

summary: The overlay builder now uses native alpha() in the live preview and reports the fallback path for unsupported browsers.
